agot_canon_children_Adarys_53_start_valid_pregnancy_effect = {
	story_owner = {
		save_scope_as = canon_father
		every_in_list = {
			variable = canon_mothers
			save_scope_as = canon_mother
			# Mother Drahar_70
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_character_flag = is_Drahar_70
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_basic_trigger = {
						FATHER = scope:canon_father
						MOTHER = scope:canon_mother
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Adarys_54 BIRTH_YEAR = 8141 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8140 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_effect = {
						CHILD_ID = Adarys_54
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					# Twins - Adarys_55, Adarys_56
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Adarys_55 BIRTH_YEAR = 8144 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8143 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_twins_effect = {
						TWIN_ONE_ID = Adarys_55
						TWIN_TWO_ID = Adarys_56
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Adarys_57 BIRTH_YEAR = 8146 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8145 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_effect = {
						CHILD_ID = Adarys_57
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				agot_canon_children_life_cycle_effect = { MOTHER = scope:canon_mother FINAL_CHILD_ID = Adarys_57 }
			}
		}
	}
}

		save_scope_as = canon_father
		every_in_list = {
			variable = canon_mothers
			save_scope_as = canon_mother
			# Mother Vance_Wayfarers_Rest_31
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_character_flag = is_Vance_Wayfarers_Rest_31
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_basic_trigger = {
						FATHER = scope:canon_father
						MOTHER = scope:canon_mother
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Tully_50 BIRTH_YEAR = 8133 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8132 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_effect = {
						CHILD_ID = Tully_50
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Tully_51 BIRTH_YEAR = 8135 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8134 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_effect = {
						CHILD_ID = Tully_51
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Tully_52 BIRTH_YEAR = 8140 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8139 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_effect = {
						CHILD_ID = Tully_52
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Tully_53 BIRTH_YEAR = 8142 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8141 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_effect = {
						CHILD_ID = Tully_53
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Tully_54 BIRTH_YEAR = 8145 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8144 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_effect = {
						CHILD_ID = Tully_54
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = { agot_canon_children_child_pregnancy_trigger = { ID = Tully_55 BIRTH_YEAR = 8146 BIRTH_YEAR_MIN = 8145 } }
					agot_canon_children_start_pregnancy_effect = {
						CHILD_ID = Tully_55
						BIRTH_FLAG = birth_will_go_smoothly
					}
				}
				agot_canon_children_life_cycle_effect = { MOTHER = scope:canon_mother FINAL_CHILD_ID = Tully_55 }
			}
		}
	}
}

		}
	}
